message:
perf(btree): extend OPT-7 sort helper to replace_interior_cell + 2 peers

Re-profile after OPT-1..7 showed quicksort + small_sort_general at 2.00% +
1.17% self-time, both now inside `replace_interior_cell::{closure#3}` — the
SAME sort pattern (Vec<(usize, usize, usize)> sorted by Reverse(.0)) but
at a different call site OPT-7 didn't patch. Swap the 3 remaining
`sort_unstable_by_key(|k| Reverse(k.0))` sites in cursor.rs to the
size-dispatched helper `sort_cells_desc_by_ptr` landed by OPT-7.

Sites converted:
- cursor.rs:4466 (inside `replace_interior_cell` interior-defrag path)
- cursor.rs:4810 (similar cell-shift path)
- cursor.rs:5152 (interior-defrag final-offset computation)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
